ai_summary: Mahindra Finance reported an improved ESG rating from Crisil ESG Ratings, achieving a "Strong" score of 70 (up from 66) and a Core ESG Rating of 73. This positive development enhances the company's sustainability profile and could positively impact investor perception. Notably, Crisil independently assigned this rating based solely on public disclosures, rather than through a direct engagement with the company, which is an important contextual detail.
